description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:24.04 Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt and installs build-essential and libboost-all-dev. Define two jobs in the default test stage: compile_auto and compile_main. The compile_auto job executes "cd tools/auto/" then "make", and publishes the resulting ./tools/auto/auto binary as an artifact. The compile_main job runs "cd src/", "make all", then returns to the project root, and stores all files under ./bin/ as artifacts.
